name: Well Life Nursing Care
desc: Designed and developed for an independent nursing care provider launching their business. Built from the ground up to establish their online presence, communicate their services, and convert first-time visitors into clients.

name: Icons by Heynendo
desc: A React-first icon library built to give developers a clean, flexible set of customizable icons. Installable via npm and available to copy or download directly from the site.

name: Schedule System
desc: A full-stack MERN application built to demonstrate end-to-end scheduling capabilities, featuring role-based authentication, separate client and admin experiences, and real-time appointment booking logic handling availability, conflicts, and status tracking.

name: XCL Property Management
desc: A client project for a property management company operating across Orland Park, IL. The site showcases their available office properties with a clean, navigable layout built for both current and prospective tenants — making it straightforward to explore locations, review details, and get in touch with the team.

name: Rebie's Bakery
desc: A custom site for a home-based custom bakery, giving the business a professional online presence to showcase their work and attract new customers. Features a full photo gallery of custom creations, a browsable menu, and a contact section for placing inquiries — turning a word-of-mouth business into one that's discoverable online.

name: Git Repo Tracker
desc: A developer tool built around the GitHub API, designed to make repository activity more readable at a glance. Input any public repository URL to visualize commits, branches, and key details in a clean, organized layout — with the option to export commit data in your preferred format.

name: HF Photography
desc: Designed and developed for a local freelance photographer looking to establish a professional online presence. The site showcases her portfolio, introduces her background and style, and makes it easy for prospective clients to get in touch
